title: blephariglottis × keenanii
intro: Blephariglottis × keenanii, also known as Keenan's Epimedium, is a hybrid orchid species that has been used in herbal medicine for centuries. It contains compounds such as icariin and epimedin, which have been shown to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Blephariglottis × keenanii include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced cognitive function, and potential anti-aging effects. Blephariglottis × keenanii can be prepared as a dietary supplement in capsule or tablet form, as well as a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
